claim_scope.protocol_support: complete for declared executable iCKB public branches
claim_scope.builder_scope: not part of the 0.18 protocol-equivalence claim; headless Action Builder and CCC-compatible drafts are 0.19 scope

default_production_evidence.script_group: normalized fixtures declare script_under_test_roles and execute original/generated scripts in matching lock/type positions
default_production_evidence.cell_deps: execution fixture_sha256 covers identical cell dep shape; deployment manifest checks original/generated code hash, hash type, dep type, and missing/wrong dep rejection
default_production_evidence.header_deps: DAO and receipt rows include positive and malformed header_dep permutations
default_production_evidence.outputs_data: normalized fixtures bind outputs and outputs_data by index and include malformed/trailing data rejects
default_production_evidence.witnesses: DAO withdrawal rows include witness input_type placement, empty/short/long, missing, and wrong-index rejects
default_production_evidence.capacity_fee_tx_size_cycles: each active differential row records tx_size_bytes, occupied_capacity_shannons, fee_shannons, original_cycles, and cellscript_cycles
default_production_evidence.deployment_manifest: artifact hashes and script-role evidence are checked for the differential rows; registry-backed deployment resolution is 0.19 scope
default_production_evidence.builder_plan: not claimed by this manifest; 0.19 owns live-cell resolution and CCC-compatible transaction drafts

default_hardening.mutation_coverage: all reject rows must carry a named failure_mode and remain dual-side fail; this manifest validator rejects unnamed reject branches

families.description: Branches whose current evidence uses protocol-shaped bridge helpers rather than 0.19 transaction-builder inference.

branches.limitation: 0.18 exposes protocol-neutral input OutPoint tx-hash/index reads, full OutPoint binding, relative MetaPoint checks, and lock/type pair-cardinality scans. The Limit Order master-OutPoint data parser remains an iCKB-shaped bridge helper, not a 0.19 builder-level transaction inference API.
evidence_scenario_prefixes: differential: limit order input wrong master
differential: limit order output short master
differential: limit order UDT-to-CKB input wrong master
differential: limit order UDT-to-CKB output short master
required_scenarios: differential: limit order input short master OutPoint original vs CellScript agree
differential: limit order UDT-to-CKB input short master OutPoint original vs CellScript agree
differential: owned-owner related type hash mismatch original vs CellScript agree
differential: owned-owner output related type hash mismatch original vs CellScript agree

families.description: Legacy probes that are not executable iCKB public claims.

branches.reason: The original executable iCKB receipt data does not expose a standalone synthetic receipt-id branch; duplicate and group mint behavior is covered by executable receipt group rows.
replacement_scenarios: differential: receipt group exact mint original vs CellScript agree
differential: duplicate receipt output original vs CellScript agree

branches.reason: The old model-only wrong-owner field was replaced by executable Owned-Owner script pairing rows.

differential: owned-owner missing owner original vs CellScript agree

branches.reason: The old model-only immature redeem probe was replaced by executed DAO since/header withdrawal fixtures.

branches.reason: No executable fixture in the audited original iCKB binaries exposes a separate owner-auth witness payload branch; ownership is represented by script placement and MetaPoint/OutPoint pairing in the executable rows.
